name: Antipasto
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the peppers, onion, celery, carrots, garlic, mushrooms, and cauliflower.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped vegetables to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until they are tender.
4. Mix well with the cooked vegetables.
5. Pour into sterilized jars and allow to cool before refrigerating.
6. When serving, place antipasto on a pretty dish and surround with crackers.
